commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content:
AND the children of (a) Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Juda, Issachar, and Zabulon,
(a) This patriarch first called Jacob signifying supplanter was afterward called Israel, that is, Seeing God, or valiant with God. Gen 35.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Jared, means descending or “holding together.” Malaleleel, means “the praised of God,” or “praising God.” Cainan means “lamentation,” or “their possession.”

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
